---
name: New subject pack
about: Add a quiz-builder pack for a field that is not covered yet (you do not need Git)
title: "[Subject] "
labels: subject-pack
---

**What subject?**
For example: nursing, organic chemistry, constitutional law, music theory.

**Do you want to write it, or request it?**
Either is welcome. If you are requesting, describe the field so someone else can pick it up.

**If you are writing it, paste your draft below.**
Copy an existing pack (like `skills/quiz-builder/domains/business.md`) and fill in the five sections for your field: core concepts, the kinds of scenarios that fit, common student misconceptions, the terms an answer must name, and a few example questions. No real student names or institution branding. We will turn it into a pull request for you if you would rather not use Git.

```
paste your draft pack here
```
